multiqc_samplesheet.description: The sample sheet provided as input to the pipeline. Contains per-sample metadata. Only the response label is relevant for analysis; file paths (data_directory, expression_profile) are excluded.

multiqc_atlas.description: Summary of the cells and genes in the reference atlas. If the same atlas is used for multiple samples, table rows will be repeated.

properties.n_genes: Total unique genes in the atlas.
properties.mean_genes_by_counts: Avg genes detected per cell (weighted by counts).
properties.mean_cells_by_counts: Avg cells per gene (weighted by counts).
properties.mean_total_nnz_counts: Avg total non-zero expression counts per cell.
properties.mean_percent_mito: Avg % of counts from mitochondrial genes per cell.

multiqc_atlas_ct.description: Summary of the cell types in the atlas. Values are raw cell counts per type.
multiqc_atlas_ct.key_type: Cell type names (example: 'acinar cell', 'type B pancreatic cell'). 'unknown' = unassigned cells.
multiqc_atlas_ct.value_type: integer - raw cell count per type

multiqc_adata.description: Summary of the AnnData object right after it was read. Represents the input tissue sample before any processing.

properties.n_genes: Total unique genes in the sample.
properties.mean_genes_by_counts: Avg genes detected per spot (weighted by counts).
properties.mean_cells_by_counts: Avg spots per gene (weighted by counts).
properties.mean_total_nnz_counts: Avg total non-zero expression counts per spot.
properties.mean_percent_mito: Avg % of counts from mitochondrial genes per spot.

multiqc_deconvolved_ct.description: Assigned cell types based on deconvolution / cell typing results. Values are spot counts per assigned type.
multiqc_deconvolved_ct.key_type: Cell type names. 'unknown' = spots with no confident assignment.
multiqc_deconvolved_ct.value_type: integer - number of spots assigned to each cell type

multiqc_deconvolved_probs.description: Average max cell type probabilities used to assign the cell types (greater is better). Reflects confidence of each assignment.
multiqc_deconvolved_probs.key_type: Cell type names. 'unknown' = avg probability for unassigned spots (this is a probability, not a count).
multiqc_deconvolved_probs.value_type: float, range 0-1 - higher = more confident assignment

multiqc_squidpy_ligrec_interactions.description: Squidpy ligand-receptor interaction scores. Mean interaction across samples, shown when no differential interactions were found between sample groups.
multiqc_squidpy_ligrec_interactions.key_example: 'MIF-CD74-type B pancreatic cell-type A enteroendocrine cell' = MIF (ligand) binding CD74 (receptor), type B pancreatic cell sending to type A enteroendocrine cell.
multiqc_squidpy_ligrec_interactions.value_type: float - mean interaction score; higher = stronger interaction
multiqc_squidpy_ligrec_interactions.note: Some gene names contain hyphens (example: HLA-C, HLA-DRA), so the key cannot be split on hyphens alone.

multiqc_Moran_I_interactions.description: Moran's I spatial autocorrelation scores per gene. Mean interaction across samples, shown when no differential interactions were found between sample groups.
multiqc_Moran_I_interactions.value_type: float, range 0-1 - higher = expression more spatially clustered across tissue spots

multiqc_spatial_neighbors.description: Cell type immediate neighborhood across samples. Each section (multiqc_spatial_neighbors, _1, _2, ...) represents one focal cell type and counts how many neighbors of each type surround it. Focal cell types are dynamically generated during merge based on actual data.
multiqc_spatial_neighbors.key_type: Cell type names. 'NA' = spots with no valid neighborhood assignment.
multiqc_spatial_neighbors.value_type: float - number of immediate neighbors of that cell type
